overview.description: Big Four professional services firm offering audit, tax, legal, and AI-enabled consulting in the Czech Republic
overview.description_long: KPMG Česká republika, s.r.o. is the Czech member firm of KPMG International, one of the Big Four global professional services networks. Founded in 1990, the firm provides audit, tax, legal, M&A advisory, and consulting services to hundreds of companies across the private and public sectors. Its consulting team of 300+ specialists covers technology (including AI and data), security, and business transformation. KPMG Czech Republic is part of the KPMG CEE network spanning 40 offices in 16 countries led by Radek Halíček.
overview.tagline: Audit, tax, advisory and legal services

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague in 1990 as part of KPMG's expansion into Central and Eastern Europe following the fall of communism. In 1991, KPMG conducted the first audits within the Czech Republic's privatisation process.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Prague by František Dostálek and Jan Žůrek
Conducted first audits in Czech Republic's privatisation process
Radek Halíček re-elected head of KPMG CEE, to lead 40 offices in 16 countries until 2030

leadership.name: Daniel Szmaragowski
leadership.role: Partner in charge of Tax and Legal

leadership.name: Carolyn Břečťanová
leadership.role: Partner in charge of Quality and Risk Management

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: KPMG CZ is a professional services firm — AI advisory is one component of broad consulting practice. Some consulting workflows (data analysis, report drafting) face automation risk, but deep regulatory expertise (audit, tax, legal), client relationships, and the firm's role helping enterprises adopt AI provide resilience.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: As a Big Four member firm with 35+ years in the Czech market and a diversified service portfolio (audit, tax, legal, consulting), KPMG CZ operates in a mature, resilient market with strong demand from both private and public sector clients.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: KPMG Czech Republic is a self-sustaining professional services firm generating revenue directly from client engagements. As part of the global KPMG network ($32B+ annual revenues), there is no meaningful funding or runway risk.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Established Big Four firm with strong brand, diversified revenue streams, 1000+ employees, and deep entrenchment in regulated industries (finance, public sector). Low overall risk despite some medium-term automation pressure on consulting workflows.

metadata.notes: No CNAIP URL available. Data gathered from kpmg.com/cz/en website. KPMG CZ included in CNAIP catalog as an AI advisory/consulting provider. Consulting team is 300 strong. Google and DuckDuckGo searches were blocked by bot detection; search-based sources not available.
